title: corydalis solida var. digitata
intro: Corydalis solida var. digitata, commonly known as Chinese goldenseal or goldenseal, is a plant species that belongs to the Papaveraceae family. Traditionally used in Chinese medicine, corydalis solida var. digitata is valued for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which make it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as relieving pain and inflammation, reducing fever, and promoting relaxation. Corydalis solida var. digitata is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, although its safety and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically studied.
